creator: social@giovannimanzoni.com
text:
Same problem wit upgrade to 10.2.13 . attached patch work again. I found this thread :

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2017-October/279351.html

But I use portmaster and I do not want to deinstall and reinstall by hands, I would that ports and portmaster work together without problems. Isn't it possible for mariadb ?
